hero.thesis: Deliver comprehensive SEO audits to local service providers and upsell ongoing optimization retainers for their websites.
hero.marketSize: $80 billion SEO industry with a focus on local businesses seeking visibility online.
hero.payingEvidence: Growing demand for local SEO services, with businesses willing to pay $500-$1500 for audits and monthly retainers.

ninetyDay.title: Foundation and Setup

actions.action: Register your business as an LLC using Stripe Atlas for ease of setup.
Set up a professional email and domain using Google Workspace.
Create an audit template in Notion that highlights key SEO areas: on-page, off-page, technical.

ninetyDay.metric: Business setup and operational tools in place.

ninetyDay.title: Market Research and Prospecting

actions.action: Identify 50 local service businesses in your area using LinkedIn Sales Navigator.
Join relevant Reddit communities like r/LocalSEO and Discord servers such as 'SEO Growers'.
Compile a list of local SEO pain points from these communities and LinkedIn.

ninetyDay.metric: 50 potential businesses identified with SEO needs.

ninetyDay.title: Outreach and Initial Engagement

actions.action: Craft a compelling cold email using insights from your research.
Send out 20 personalized cold emails to local businesses.
Follow up on the emails sent on Monday.

ninetyDay.metric: At least 5 responses from initial outreach.

ninetyDay.title: First Audits and Feedback

actions.action: Conduct 3 free audits to refine your process using your Notion template.
Collect feedback from the free audits to improve your service.
Refine your audit process based on feedback using Notion.

ninetyDay.metric: Refined audit process with positive feedback.

actions.action: Convert 2 free audit clients to paid audits; pitch $500 audit services.
Offer ongoing $1k/mo retainer to one audit client.
Follow up on retainer offer with client incentives.

ninetyDay.title: Testimonials and Case Studies

actions.action: Request testimonials from your first few clients.
Create case studies from successful audits using Notion.
Publish testimonials and case studies on your website.

ninetyDay.metric: Website showcases client testimonials and case studies.

actions.action: Join local business networking groups on Meetup.com.
Attend a local networking event and introduce your services.
Follow up with contacts made at the networking event.

ninetyDay.title: Scale Operations

actions.action: Automate client scheduling with Calendly.
Hire a VA for administrative tasks via Upwork.
Train your VA using Loom videos on processes.

ninetyDay.metric: VA handling administrative tasks freeing up your time.

actions.action: Enroll in an advanced SEO course on Coursera to upskill.
Implement a new SEO technique from the course on a client site.
Measure results from the new technique using Google Analytics.

ninetyDay.title: Refine Pricing Strategy

actions.action: Analyze competitors' pricing strategies using LinkedIn competitor analysis.
Adjust your pricing tiers based on analysis and client feedback.
Communicate new pricing to current clients.

ninetyDay.metric: Updated pricing strategy communicated to clients.

ninetyDay.title: Content Marketing

actions.action: Write a blog post on local SEO trends for your website.
Share your blog post in LinkedIn groups and Reddit communities.
Engage with comments and feedback on your blog post.

ninetyDay.metric: Increased website traffic from content marketing.

ninetyDay.title: Review and Optimize

actions.action: Review your client retention rate and identify improvement areas.
Optimize your audit process based on client feedback.
Set goals for the next quarter based on this quarter's performance.

ninetyDay.metric: Clear goals and an optimized process for the next quarter.

toolStack.name: Notion
toolStack.why: Organize audit templates, client feedback, and case studies.
toolStack.pricing: Free plan available, paid plans start at $8/month.

toolStack.name: Calendly
toolStack.pricing: Free plan available, paid plans start at $8/month.

toolStack.name: Upwork
toolStack.why: Hire a virtual assistant to handle administrative tasks.
toolStack.pricing: Free to post jobs, service fees apply.

firstTenCustomers.script:
Hi [Name],

I specialize in helping local service businesses like [Niche] improve their online visibility through comprehensive SEO audits. I'd love to provide you with an audit that outlines quick wins and long-term strategies. Can we schedule a 15-minute call to discuss this?

Best,
[Your Name]
firstTenCustomers.cadence: Initial email on Monday, follow-up on Wednesday, final follow-up on Friday.

pricing.premium: $1,500/month with additional services like content creation.
pricing.raisingRules: Review and adjust pricing every six months based on market demand and client feedback.

failureModes: Overpromising audit results leading to client disappointment.
Undercharging for services leading to burnout.
Failure to follow up leads causing lost opportunities.
Taking on too many clients without a VA leading to poor service.
Ignoring client feedback and not iterating the audit process.
Relying solely on one channel for client acquisition.

setup.llc: Register through Stripe Atlas for a streamlined process.
setup.payments: Set up Stripe for client payments and invoicing.
setup.contracts: Use Bonsai to draft and manage client contracts.
setup.insurance: Consult with Hiscox for business liability insurance.

scaling: To scale from a solo operation to a small team, start by hiring a virtual assistant (VA) to handle administrative and scheduling tasks. This frees up your time to focus on client strategy and acquisition. As your client base grows, consider hiring a junior SEO specialist who can take on some of the audit and reporting work, allowing you to maintain quality while increasing capacity. Use tools like Notion for team collaboration and project management to keep everyone aligned. Set clear KPIs for your team to maintain service quality and client satisfaction. Regularly review processes and client feedback to continuously improve your service offerings. Invest in team training and development to keep your team up to date with the latest SEO techniques and tools.
